splits.title: Mary Birch Miller, a Gold Star Mother
splits.author: Cora Carver Ritchie
splits.start_boundary: Mary Birch Miller, a Gold Star Mother By
splits.end_boundary: and marvel? If By Dying By Arthur James

files.notes: The file contains two main articles. The first is about jubilee boxes opened in 1930, and the second is a biographical sketch of Mary Birch Miller. There appears to be a short poem 'If By Dying' at the very end that may be part of the second article or a separate piece, but based on the contents listing it seems to be a separate item that got merged in.
